sections.paragraph: βαϑύς, εῖα, ύ [etymol. unknown] ‘reaching to a point relatively far down from the top’, deep, of a well J 4:11. The strong component of extendedness readily transfers to other phenomena: of dawn ὄρϑρου βαθέως early in the morning Lk 24:1; ὕπνος βαθύς deep sleep Ac 20:9; τὰ βαϑέα τοῦ σατανᾶdepths of Satan Rv 2:24.
